headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Amcor, Raises Price Target to $43
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Gabe Hajde   maintains Amcor (NYSE:AMCR) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $41 to $43.

headline: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Spotlight On 3 Materials Stocks Delivering High-Dividend Yields
summary: In uncertain markets, dividend-yielding stocks are popular. Benzinga provides latest analyst ratings and accuracy, for 3 high-yielding stocks in materials sector.

headline: BMO Capital Initiates Coverage On Amcor with Market Perform Rating, Announces Price Target of $47
summary: BMO Capital  analyst Ketan Mamtora   initiates coverage on Amcor (NYSE:AMCR) with a Market Perform rating and announces Price Target of $47.
